onset.Description: Time of the event in seconds from the start of the recording.

duration.Description: Duration of the event in seconds.

value.Description: Event trigger code as recorded in the EEG file.

trial_type.Description: Type of experimental event corresponding to the trigger code.

Levels.238: Start of each 2-minute block (for control, positive, and negative conditions).
Levels.222: Increase in object brightness or sound volume (feedback signal).
Levels.190: Decrease in object brightness or sound volume (feedback signal).
Levels.126: Resting-state segment marker: first for eyes open, then for eyes closed.
